channel.title: Daily arXiv Digest (JP)
channel.description: 毎朝の arXiv 注目論文10本を、NotebookLM が日本語ポッドキャストで紹介。
channel.itunes:author: M-Aji
channel.itunes:summary: 毎朝の arXiv 注目論文10本を、NotebookLM が日本語ポッドキャストで紹介。

item.title: arXiv 2026-07-05
item.description:
本日の注目論文：
1. What LLM Agents Say When No One Is Watching: Social Structure and Latent Objective Emergence in Multi-Agent Debates — Arman Ghaffarizadeh, Danyal Mohaddes et al. https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02507 2. Reasoning LLM Improves Speaker Recognition in Long-form TV Dramas — Yuxuan Li, Lingxi Xie et al. https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02504 3. DemoPSD: Disagreement-Modulated Policy Self-Distillation — Yunhe Li, Hao Shi et al. https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02502 4. Beyond Adam: SOAP and Muon for Faster, Label-Efficient Training of Machine Learning Interatomic Potentials — Gil Harari, Yoel Zimmermann et al. https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02499 5. Controllable Sim Agents with Behavior Latents — Juanwu Lu, Junyu Zhu et al. https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02496

item.title: arXiv 2026-07-04
item.description:
本日の注目論文：
1. Distributed Attacks in Persistent-State AI Control — Josh Hills, Ida Caspary et al. https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02514 2. LACUNA: A Testbed for Evaluating Localization Precision for LLM Unlearning — Matteo Boglioni, Thibault Rousset et al. https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02513 3. Program-as-Weights: A Programming Paradigm for Fuzzy Functions — Wentao Zhang, Liliana Hotsko et al. https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02512 4. Online Safety Monitoring for LLMs — Mona Schirmer, Metod Jazbec et al. https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02510 5. ReContext: Recursive Evidence Replay as LLM Harness for Long-Context Reasoning — Yanjun Zhao, Ruizhong Qiu et al. https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02509

item.title: arXiv 2026-07-03
item.description:
本日の注目論文：
1. Measuring the Gap Between Human and LLM Research Ideas — Ziyu Chen, Yilun Zhao et al. https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.01233 2. Is One Layer Enough? Training A Single Transformer Layer Can Match Full-Parameter RL Training — Zijian Zhang, Rizhen Hu et al. https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.01232 3. Language-Critique Imitation Learning from Suboptimal Demonstrations — Chih-Han Yang, Dai-Jie Wu et al. https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.01225 4. AutoMem: Automated Learning of Memory as a Cognitive Skill — Shengguang Wu, Hao Zhu et al. https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.01224 5. Theoria: Rewrite-Acceptability Verification over Informal Reasoning States — Ben Slivinski, Michael Saldivar https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.01223

item.title: arXiv 2026-07-02
item.description:
本日の注目論文：
1. Introspective Coupling: Self-Explanation Training Tracks Behavioral Change Despite Fixed Supervision — Zifan Carl Guo, Laura Ruis et al. https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.32038 2. QVal: Cheaply Evaluating Dense Supervision Signals for Long-Horizon LLM Agents — Sergio Hernández-Gutiérrez, Matteo Merler et al. https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.32034 3. Reinforcement Learning with Metacognitive Feedback Elicits Faithful Uncertainty Expression in LLMs — Gabrielle Kaili-May Liu, Avi Caciularu et al. https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.32032 4. When LLMs Read Tables Carelessly: Measuring and Reducing Data Referencing Errors — Yuqing Yang, Qi Zhu et al. https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.32029 5. Freeform Preference Learning for Robotic Manipulation — Marcel Torne, Anubha Mahajan et al. https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.32027

item.title: arXiv 2026-07-01

本日の注目論文：
1. VLK: Learning Humanoid Loco-Manipulation from Synthetic Interactions in Reconstructed Scenes — Yen-Jen Wang, Jiaman Li et al. https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30645 2. GROW$^2$: Grounding Which and Where for Robot Tool Use — Yuhong Deng, Yuyao Liu et al. https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30632

item.description:
本日の注目論文：
1. Self-Refining Agentic Reinforcement Learning for Vision-Conditioned UAV Navigation — Roohan Ahmed Khan, Yasheerah Yaqoot et al. https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03963 2. Language Models Need Sleep: Learning to Self-Modify and Consolidate Memories — Ali Behrouz, Farnoosh Hashemi et al. https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03979 3. Quantifying Faithful Confidence Expression in Large Reasoning Models — Areeb Gani, Asal Meskin et al. https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03969 4. VLESA: Vision-Language Embodied Safety Agent for Human Activity Monitoring — Hanjiang Hu, Yiyuan Pan et al. https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03954 5. Agentic Chain-of-Thought Steering for Efficient and Controllable LLM Reasoning — Yu Xia, Zhouhang Xie et al. https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03965

item.title: arXiv 2026-06-03
item.description:
本日の注目論文：
1. Bridging the Last Mile of Time Series Forecasting with LLM Agents — Yuhua Liao, Zetian Wang et al. https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02497 2. Monitoring Agentic Systems Before They're Reliable — Marisa Ferrara Boston, Glen Hanson et al. https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02494 3. A No-Regret Framework for Adaptive Incentive Design — Georgios Vasileiou, Lantian Zhang et al. https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02529 4. Auditing Asset-Specific Preferences in Financial Large Language Models: Evidence from Bitcoin Representations and Portfolio Allocation — Wenbin Wu https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02528 5. FigSIM: A Dataset for Fine-grained Suicide Severity and Figurative Language in Suicide Memes — Liuliu Chen, Elise R. Carrotte et al. https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02523

item.title: arXiv 2026-06-02
item.description:
本日の注目論文：
1. Skill Reuse as Compression in Agentic RL — Zhikun Xu, Yu Feng et al. https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.31509 2. Evaluating Factual Density in Multi-Source RAG: A Study in Medical AI Accuracy — Michael R. DeMarco https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.31506 3. Language Models Learn Constructional Semantics, Not To Mention Syntax: Investigating LM Understanding of Paired-Focus Constructions — Wesley Scivetti, Ethan Wilcox et al. https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.31586 4. What Gets Unmasked First? Trajectory Analysis of Diffusion Models for Graph-to-Text Generation — Qing Wang, Jacob Devasier et al. https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.31564 5. What Am I Missing? Question-Answering as Hidden State Probing — Chu Fei Luo, Samuel Dahan et al. https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.31561

item.title: arXiv 2026-06-01

本日の注目論文：
1. Stateful Online Monitoring Catches Distributed Agent Attacks — Davis Brown, Samarth Bhargav et al. https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.31593 2. LongTraceRL: Learning Long-Context Reasoning from Search Agent Trajectories with Rubric Rewards — Nianyi Lin, Jiajie Zhang et al. https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.31584 3. Disagreeing Rationales: Rethinking Classification and Explainability Evaluation in Hate Speech Detection — Benedetta Muscato, Beiduo Chen et al. https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.31563 4. Effects of Vertex Merging & Splitting on Large Coauthorship Networks: A Counterfactual Analysis — Jinseok Kim https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.31555 5. A Case Study in Physicist-Supervised AI Development of Scientific Software — Nhat-Minh Nguyen https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30353

本日の注目論文：
